metadata.notes: Set MAKE_LAUNCH_COMPLETE_WEBHOOK_URL in Mr. Waiz to this hook URL. Payload: event=launch_complete, client_id, client_name, launch_date, slack_id, completed_by, checklist. App posts full department audit to ops_alerts (SLACK_OPS_CHANNEL_SLUG) and short go-live to client slack_id. Use this webhook as fallback when Slack API is unavailable. Optionally update ClickUp task status to Live.
